== Notes for [[Item:Q100155|Q100155]] ==

* Wikipedia: [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hanoch_ben_Moses Hanoch ben Moses] & [https://he.wikipedia.org/wiki/%D7%97%D7%A0%D7%95%D7%9A_%D7%91%D7%9F_%D7%9E%D7%A9%D7%94 חנוך בן משה.]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD76759E1EFBBFA9822EF79916CC187
geni:6000000034591015259

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]][[Category:Pages]]
